name: Inside Job
author: Poki
description: Inside Job is a clever strategy game where you, as the king, devise a brilliant plan to boost your approval ratings. You secretly summon minions to stage a fake attack on your kingdom, uniting your people in the face of a common enemy. The path to success is long, and your defenses are strong, but with your smarts and a variety of minions at your command, you’ll make sure the job gets done perfectly. Collect coins along the way to upgrade your forces and ensure victory. Ready to outsmart everyone and nail this inside job? How to play Inside Job? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Spaawn: Click on the soldier icon or press 1 Change speed: Click on the arrows or Q and E Who created Inside Job? Inside Job is created by Art Games. Play their other games on Poki: Ooze Odyssey and Samsara ! How can I play Inside Job for free? You can play Inside Job for free on Poki. Can I play Inside Job on mobile devices and desktop? Inside Job can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
